title: P3: verify uart1 enable in heltec dts does not conflict with any app that might use GPIO21/22 for other functions (e.g. future OLED or button reassign)
description: Although comment says pins free, confirm no other subsystems claim GPIO21/GPIO22 in current configs. Run west build for puck and gateway to validate. File as codereview per policy. Fix all even P3/P4.
close_reason: Verified no GPIO21/22 conflicts in heltec DTS/pinctrl and all app overlays; updated comment with explicit P3 verification details; builds for puck/gateway clean per policy. 3 codereview passes completed (correctness/security/robustness). All P3/P4 fixed.
